title: Ethereal Argentinian Tofu Broth
description: A light, savory broth featuring silken tofu and Mediterranean herbs, perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: Gently press silken tofu to remove excess moisture, then cut into 1 cm cubes.
In a saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat and sauté diced shallot until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in fresh oregano and chili flakes, cooking for another 30 seconds.
Pour in low-sodium vegetable broth and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add sliced tofu cubes to the broth and simmer for 5 minutes, being careful not to boil.
Stir in lemon zest, lemon juice, and sea salt, adjusting seasoning with black pepper.
Reduce heat to low and let the broth rest for 5 minutes so flavors meld.
Just before serving, whisk in a handful of chopped fresh parsley.
Ladle the broth into warm bowls and drizzle with a light swirl of olive oil.
Garnish with an extra pinch of oregano if desired.
Serve immediately while hot for a comforting, light dinner.
